# Cma Es

**Summary**: An evolutionary algorithm used for non-linear, non-convex optimization problems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-sibaweihi|Sibaweihi, 2013]] applied CMA-ES to optimize well locations and injection periods in both heterogeneous and homogeneous models.

## Key Results and Findings

- CMA-ES provided more consistent NPV results across different realizations compared to the DE algorithm. ([[2013-sibaweihi|Sibaweihi, 2013, p. 76]])
